title: Add formatDate utility function in dateUtils.ts
description: Create a new utility function `formatDate(date: Date, locale: string): string` in `src/utils/dateUtils.ts` using `Intl.DateTimeFormat` for locale-aware date formatting. Add JSDoc documentation and co-located unit tests in `src/utils/dateUtils.test.ts`. Reuse existing test patterns from `src/utils/format-date.test.ts` (vitest with `describe/it/expect`). Note: existing `src/utils/format-date.ts` uses a different signature and `FormatDateOptions` object — this is a separate, simpler utility.
existing_patterns: src/utils/format-date.ts — uses Intl.DateTimeFormat for locale formatting; dateUtils should reuse the same native `Intl` approach
src/utils/format-date.test.ts — vitest test structure with `describe/it/expect` to reuse for dateUtils.test.ts
